top_signals.title: Gold Holds Gain as US-Iran Truce Hopes Calm Inflation Fears
top_signals.summary: Gold held a gain after reports that the US and Iran had reached a tentative deal to extend a ceasefire and work toward an agreement to end the Middle East war eased inflation concerns.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Asia markets set for mixed open as Iran launches missiles despite signs of temporary truce
top_signals.summary: Asia-Pacific markets set for mixed open as investors weighed renewed Iran tensions against ceasefire optimism.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UK and European passports linked to restricted Chinese investors
top_signals.summary: Critics raise concerns around critical national infrastructure and potential counterfeiting
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Government urges transport firms to guard against AI misuse
top_signals.summary: The instructions were made at a meeting with operators from six infrastructure sectors, also including ports, airports, logistics and water supply.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
